markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss plans for creating a video to promote Deep Gram's vision and new speech-to-speech product.](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Initially the video was envisioned as a product demo/keynote style for the speech-to-speech launch](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Marcel proposed shifting to a more cinematic, storytelling approach to convey Deep Gram's broader vision of enhancing human conversations through AI](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [The video should feel intimate, emotionally resonant, and highlight how AI can augment rather than replace the human experience](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [They may need to find a different, more affordable videographer to achieve the desired documentary/masterclass style](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
  - [The speech-to-speech product launch will move forward separately from this visionary video](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

## Topics

### Initial Video Concept

  - ### Product Demo/Keynote Style
      - [Originally envisioned as a straightforward product demo/keynote for the speech-to-speech API launch](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [Patricia had drafted a script and storyboard for this approach](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

### Shifting to a Visionary Storytelling Approach

  - ### Emotional, Cinematic Storytelling
      - [Marcel proposed a more cinematic, emotionally resonant documentary style](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
      - [Draw inspiration from shows like MasterClass and Chef's Table](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [Focus on Deep Gram's vision of using AI to enhance human conversations and relationships](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [Highlight real human stories and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - ### Concerns with Current Videographer Quote
      - [The $30K quote from the proposed videographer may be too expensive for this new vision](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
      - [His previous work is high-quality but focused on personal stories, not tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [They may need to find someone with more relevant portfolio at a lower cost](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)

### Separating Video from Product Launch

  - ### Speech-to-Speech Launch Separate
      - [The speech-to-speech API launch does not depend on having this new visionary video ready](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
      - [They can proceed with the API launch using other promotional materials](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - ### Take More Time for Visionary Video
      - [With the new storytelling approach, they likely need more time to properly develop the script and vision](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [No need to rush the video just for the speech-to-speech launch](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to connect with Alexa about the new video direction](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Patricia to inform the current videographer they need more time, may not move forward with him](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Research and vet other videographers who can achieve the desired documentary/storytelling style](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
  - [Regroup to further develop the script and narrative once the new direction is clear](https://fathom.video/share/du5z4DVjt-C1yEgG6LBVzyB-Asskxsbv?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)
